reviews.comment:
Es la única estación de servicio por la zona y es parada obligada ya que se realiza el control fitosanitario. La estacion cuenta con dos baños que son insuficientes para la cantidad de usuarios y siempre están sucios.

(Translated by Google)
It's the only gas station in the area and a mandatory stop because phytosanitary inspections are carried out there. The station has two restrooms, which are insufficient for the number of users and are always dirty.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/10917902775629832707/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNCZzZmVkhnEAE

reviews.comment:
Falta servicio nocturno de la tienda. Es cierto que la rentabilidad juega un papel importante pero después de 230 kilómetros desde San Luis y 160 kilómetros a Caucete, seria importante tener 24hs de servicompras/mini full o al menos agua caliente para el termo y los baños un poco más cuidados.
Fui 21 años administrador de estaciones de servios YPF ACA, conozco el tema. También soy socio ACA y desde mi niñez recorrí estaciones YPF ACA (mi padre es socio vitalicio).
Siempre uno espera encontrar servicios y calidad cuando ve el totem y se siente en casa, en un lugar seguro.

(Translated by Google)
The store lacks night service. It's true that profitability plays an important role, but after traveling 230 kilometers from San Luis and 160 kilometers to Caucete, it would be important to have 24-hour service or mini-service, or at least hot water for the thermos and better-maintained bathrooms.
I was a YPF ACA service station manager for 21 years; I'm familiar with the subject. I'm also an ACA member and have visited YPF ACA stations since childhood (my father is a lifetime member).
You always expect to find service and quality when you see the totem pole and feel at home, in a safe place.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/10917902775629832707/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNCMnF5bGh3RRAB

reviews.comment:
No tenían débito, y la.transferenci al Galicia demoraba...tuve q pagar en efectivo, decir q tenía la.plata justa sino iba en cana.

(Translated by Google)
They didn't have a debit card, and the transfer to Galicia took a long time... I had to pay in cash, saying I had the exact amount, otherwise I would have gone to jail.
